name: python-repo-audit-implementation
description: Implements a multi-phase repository audit plan for Python packages: security fixes, DRY consolidation, dead code removal, error handling, CI matrix expansion, and packaging gaps. Use when: (1) a repo audit report exists with Critical/Major findings to implement, (2) bringing a Python utility library to production-grade quality, (3) consolidating subprocess wrappers or shared constants across multiple modules.
